title: Preschool Assistant Teacher
description:
Instructional Support

  • Assist the lead teacher in implementing lesson plans and educational activities.
  • Help guide children through learning activities, play, and routines.
  • Support the development of language, motor, and social skills through interaction and engagement.
  • Read stories, sing songs, and participate in group activities.

Supervision & Safety

  • Monitor children to ensure their safety at all times (classroom, playground, nap time).
  • Help with bathroom breaks, diapering, and handwashing routines.
  • Ensure toys and learning materials are clean and safe for use.

Classroom Management

  • Help maintain an organized, clean, and inviting classroom environment.
  • Assist with setting up activities and cleaning up afterward.
  • Support children in learning classroom rules and routines.

Behavioral Guidance

  • Model and reinforce positive behavior and social interaction.
  • Help manage conflicts among children calmly and constructively.
  • Provide emotional support and comfort when needed.

Communication

  • Communicate daily updates to the lead teacher or supervisor.
  • May interact with parents at drop-off or pick-up (depending on school policy).
  • Observe and report signs of developmental concerns or behavioral changes.

Administrative Tasks

  • Assist with attendance, snack distribution, and basic record-keeping.
  • Prepare materials for daily activities or special events.
  • Help decorate the classroom and create bulletin boards

Job Requirements:

  • Must hold at least a Fundamentals Certificate in Early Childhood Care and Education (FCECCE)
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills
  • Genuine passion for working with children
  • Capable of working both independently and as part of a collaborative team


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.
